title: The Maliau Quantitative Inventory
author: Carpenter, Daniel
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Description:   Circular plots with 50m radius and a single, 100m transect running across it; lat/long coordinates give the centre of the plot   Project:  This dataset was collected as part of the following SAFE research project:   The Maliau Quantitative Inventory     Permits:  These data were collected under permit from the following authorities:   Sabah Biodiversity Centre (Research licence JKM/MBS.1000-2/2(133))      XML metadata:  GEMINI compliant metadata for this dataset is available  here    Files:  This consists of 1 file: NHM_Quantitative_Inventory.xlsx   NHM_Quantitative_Inventory.xlsx   This file contains dataset metadata and 9 data tables:     Quadrat Data  (described in worksheet QuadratData)  Description: Environmental data describing site conditions at each study plot  Number of fields: 7  Number of data rows: 330  Fields:     Plot : Transect ID (Field type: location)   Quadrat : Distance along the 100m transect bisecting the plot (Field type: numeric)   QuadratID : Unique code for each quadrat (Field type: id)   Temperature : Air temperature (Field type: numeric)   Soil_moisture : Soil moisture (Field type: numeric)   Soil_Texture : Soil texture (Field type: categorical)   Canopy_Density : Canopy cover above the plot (Field type: categorical)      Deadwood survey  (described in worksheet Deadwood)  Description: Survey of deadwood quantity. All deadwood items with diameter > 0.5 cm and physically crossing a 100m transect bisecting the plot were individually labelled and their physical characteristics recorded.  Number of fields: 5  Number of data rows: 284  Fields:     Plot : Transect ID (Field type: location)   TransectDistance : Distance along the transect where deadwood item occurred (Field type: numeric)   DeadwoodID : Unique ID of deadwood item (Field type: id)   Diameter : Diameter of the deadwood item (Field type: numeric)   Comments : Notes on the general status of the deadwood item (Field type: comments)      Leaf litter ant communities  (described in worksheet LitterAnts)  Description: Invertebrates were collected from 1m2 quadrats and extracted using Winkler bags. There wer 15 quadrats per plot, and data are aggregated to give number per 15m2. This worksheet records the composition of ant communities, while ordinal-level results are found in the 'MajorClades_LL' worksheet.  Number of fields: 78  Number of data rows: 22  Fields:     Plot : Transect ID (Field type: location)   Cerapach : Number of individuals in leaf litter quadrats (Field type: abundance)   Aenictus :    Date range:  2012-10-01 to 2012-10-31   Latitudinal extent:  4.6922 to 4.9719   Longitudinal extent:  116.9669 to 117.8017   Taxonomic coverage:    All taxon names are validated against the GBIF backbone taxonomy. If a dataset uses a synonym, the accepted usage is shown followed by the dataset usage in brackets. Taxa that cannot be validated, including new species and other unknown taxa, morphospecies, functional groups and taxonomic levels not used in the GBIF backbone are shown in square brackets.   - steps_raw: Description:   Circular plots with 50m radius and a single, 100m transect running across it; lat/long coordinates give the centre of the plot   Project:  This dataset was collected as part of the following SAFE research project:   The Maliau Quantitative Inventory     Permits:  These data were collected under permit from the following authorities:   Sabah Biodiversity Centre (Research licence JKM/MBS.1000-2/2(133))      XML metadata:  GEMINI compliant metadata for this dataset is available  here    Files:  This consists of 1 file: NHM_Quantitative_Inventory.xlsx   NHM_Quantitative_Inventory.xlsx   This file contains dataset metadata and 9 data tables:     Quadrat Data  (described in worksheet QuadratData)  Description: Environmental data describing site conditions at each study plot  Number of fields: 7  Number of data rows: 330  Fields:     Plot : Transect ID (Field type: location)   Quadrat : Distance along the 100m transect bisecting the plot (Field type: numeric)   QuadratID : Unique code for each quadrat (Field type: id)   Temperature : Air temperature (Field type: numeric)   Soil_moisture : Soil moisture (Field type: numeric)   Soil_Texture : Soil texture (Field type: categorical)   Canopy_Density : Canopy cover above the plot (Field type: categorical)      Deadwood survey  (described in worksheet Deadwood)  Description: Survey of deadwood quantity. All deadwood items with diameter > 0.5 cm and physically crossing a 100m transect bisecting the plot were individually labelled and their physical characteristics recorded.  Number of fields: 5  Number of data rows: 284  Fields:     Plot : Transect ID (Field type: location)   TransectDistance : Distance along the transect where deadwood item occurred (Field type: numeric)   DeadwoodID : Unique ID of deadwood item (Field type: id)   Diameter : Diameter of the deadwood item (Field type: numeric)   Comments : Notes on the general status of the deadwood item (Field type: comments)      Leaf litter ant communities  (described in worksheet LitterAnts)  Description: Invertebrates were collected from 1m2 quadrats and extracted using Winkler bags. There wer 15 quadrats per plot, and data are aggregated to give number per 15m2. This worksheet records the composition of ant communities, while ordinal-level results are found in the 'MajorClades_LL' worksheet.  Number of fields: 78  Number of data rows: 22  Fields:     Plot : Transect ID (Field type: location)   Cerapach : Number of individuals in leaf litter quadrats (Field type: abundance)   Aenictus :
